performance.name: noAccumulatingSpread
performance.description: Disallow the use of spread (...) syntax on accumulators.
performance.valid:
var a = ['a', 'b', 'c'];
a.reduce((acc, val) => {acc.push(val); return acc}, []);

performance.name: noAwaitInLoops
noBarrelFile
performance.description: Disallow the use of barrel file.
performance.valid:
export type * from "foo";
export type { foo } from "foo";

performance.name: noDelete
performance.description: Disallow the use of the delete operator.

performance.name: noImgElement
performance.description: Prevent usage of element in a Next.js project.

performance.name: noNamespaceImport
performance.description: Disallow the use of namespace imports.
performance.valid:
import { foo } from "foo"
import type { bar } from "bar"
import type * as baz from "baz"

performance.name: useGoogleFontPreconnect
performance.description: Ensure the preconnect attribute is used when using Google Fonts.

performance.name: useSolidForComponent
performance.description: Enforce using Solid's <For /> component for mapping an array to JSX elements.

performance.name: useTopLevelRegex
performance.description: Require regex literals to be declared at the top level.

complexity.name: noAdjacentSpacesInRegex
complexity.description: Disallow unclear usage of consecutive space characters in regular expression literals

complexity.name: noArguments
complexity.description: Disallow the use of arguments.

complexity.name: noBannedTypes
complexity.description: Disallow primitive type aliases and misleading types.

complexity.name: noCommaOperator
complexity.description: Disallow comma operator.

complexity.name: noEmptyTypeParameters
complexity.description: Disallow empty type parameters in type aliases and interfaces.

complexity.name: noExcessiveLinesPerFunction
complexity.description: Restrict the number of lines of code in a function.

complexity.name: noExcessiveNestedTestSuites
complexity.description: This rule enforces a maximum depth to nested describe() in test files.

complexity.name: noExtraBooleanCast
complexity.description: Disallow unnecessary boolean casts

complexity.name: noFlatMapIdentity
complexity.description: Disallow to use unnecessary callback on flatMap.

complexity.name: noForEach
complexity.description: Prefer for...of statement instead of Array.forEach.

complexity.name: noImplicitCoercions
complexity.description: Disallow shorthand type conversions.

complexity.name: noStaticOnlyClass
complexity.description: This rule reports when a class has no non-static members, such as for a class used exclusively as a static namespace.

complexity.name: noThisInStatic
complexity.description: Disallow this and super in static contexts.

complexity.name: noUselessCatchBinding
complexity.description: Disallow unused catch bindings.

complexity.name: noUselessCatch
complexity.description: Disallow unnecessary catch clauses.

complexity.name: noUselessConstructor
complexity.description: Disallow unnecessary constructors.

complexity.name: noUselessContinue
complexity.description: Avoid using unnecessary continue.

complexity.name: noUselessEmptyExport
complexity.description: Disallow empty exports that don't change anything in a module file.

complexity.name: noUselessEscapeInRegex
complexity.description: Disallow unnecessary escape sequence in regular expression literals.

complexity.name: noUselessFragments
complexity.description: Disallow unnecessary fragments

complexity.name: noUselessLabel
complexity.description: Disallow unnecessary labels.

complexity.name: noUselessLoneBlockStatements
complexity.description: Disallow unnecessary nested block statements.

complexity.name: noUselessRename
complexity.description: Disallow renaming import, export, and destructured assignments to the same name.

complexity.name: noUselessStringConcat
complexity.description: Disallow unnecessary concatenation of string or template literals.

complexity.name: noUselessStringRaw
complexity.description: Disallow unnecessary String.raw function in template string literals without any escape sequence.

complexity.name: noUselessSwitchCase
complexity.description: Disallow useless case in switch statements.

complexity.name: noUselessTernary
complexity.description: Disallow ternary operators when simpler alternatives exist.

complexity.name: noUselessThisAlias
complexity.description: Disallow useless this aliasing.

complexity.name: noUselessTypeConstraint
complexity.description: Disallow using any or unknown as type constraint.

complexity.name: noUselessUndefinedInitialization
complexity.description: Disallow initializing variables to undefined.

complexity.name: noUselessUndefined
complexity.description: Disallow the use of useless undefined.

complexity.name: useArrowFunction
complexity.description: Use arrow functions over function expressions.

complexity.name: useDateNow
complexity.description: Use Date.now() to get the number of milliseconds since the Unix Epoch.

complexity.name: useFlatMap
complexity.description: Promotes the use of .flatMap() when map().flat() are used together.
complexity.invalid:
const array = ["split", "the text", "into words"];
array.map(sentence => sentence.split(' ')).flat();
complexity.valid:
const array = ["split", "the text", "into words"];
array.map(sentence => sentence.split(' ')).flat(2);

complexity.name: useIndexOf
complexity.description: Prefer Array#{indexOf,lastIndexOf}() over Array#{findIndex,findLastIndex}() when looking for the index of an item.

complexity.name: useLiteralKeys
complexity.description: Enforce the usage of a literal access to properties over computed property access.

complexity.name: useMaxParams
complexity.description: Enforce a maximum number of parameters in function definitions.

complexity.name: useNumericLiterals
complexity.description: Disallow parseInt() and Number.parseInt() in favor of binary, octal, and hexadecimal literals

complexity.name: useOptionalChain
complexity.description: Enforce using concise optional chain instead of chained logical expressions.

complexity.name: useRegexLiterals
complexity.description: Enforce the use of the regular expression literals instead of the RegExp constructor if possible.

complexity.name: useSimpleNumberKeys
complexity.description: Disallow number literal object member names which are not base 10 or use underscore as separator.

complexity.name: useSimplifiedLogicExpression
complexity.description: Discard redundant terms from logical expressions.
complexity.invalid:
const boolExp = true;
const r = true && boolExp;

complexity.name: useWhile
complexity.description: Enforce the use of while loops instead of for loops when the initializer and update expressions are not needed.

suspicious.name: noAlert
suspicious.description: Disallow the use of alert, confirm, and prompt.

suspicious.name: noApproximativeNumericConstant
suspicious.description: Use standard constants instead of approximated literals.

suspicious.name: noArrayIndexKey
suspicious.description: Discourage the usage of Array index in keys.

suspicious.name: noAssignInExpressions
suspicious.description: Disallow assignments in expressions.

suspicious.name: noAsyncPromiseExecutor
suspicious.description: Disallows using an async function as a Promise executor.
suspicious.valid:
new Promise((resolve, reject) => {})
  new Promise((resolve, reject) => {}, async function unrelated() {})
  new Foo(async (resolve, reject) => {})
  new Foo((( (resolve, reject) => {} )))

suspicious.name: noBitwiseOperators
suspicious.description: Disallow bitwise operators.

suspicious.name: noCatchAssign
suspicious.description: Disallow reassigning exceptions in catch clauses.

suspicious.name: noClassAssign
suspicious.description: Disallow reassigning class members.
suspicious.valid:
let A = class A {}
A = 0; // A is a variable.

suspicious.name: noCommentText
suspicious.description: Prevent comments from being inserted as text nodes
suspicious.valid:
<>
{/* comment */}
;
{/** comment */}
;
;
text {/* comment */}
;
{/* comment */} text
;

suspicious.name: noCompareNegZero
suspicious.description: Disallow comparing against -0

suspicious.name: noConfusingLabels
suspicious.description: Disallow labeled statements that are not loops.

suspicious.name: noConfusingVoidType
suspicious.description: Disallow void type outside of generic or return types.

suspicious.name: noConstEnum
suspicious.description: Disallow TypeScript const enum

suspicious.name: noConstantBinaryExpressions
suspicious.description: Disallow expressions where the operation doesn't affect the value

suspicious.name: noControlCharactersInRegex
suspicious.description: Prevents from having control characters and some escape sequences that match control characters in regular expression literals.

suspicious.name: noDebugger
suspicious.description: Disallow the use of debugger

suspicious.name: noDocumentCookie
suspicious.description: Disallow direct assignments to document.cookie.

suspicious.name: noDocumentImportInPage
suspicious.description: Prevents importing next/document outside of pages/_document.jsx in Next.js projects.

suspicious.name: noDoubleEquals
suspicious.description: Require the use of === and !==.

suspicious.name: noDuplicateAtImportRules
suspicious.description: Disallow duplicate @import rules.

suspicious.name: noDuplicateCase
suspicious.description: Disallow duplicate case labels.

suspicious.name: noDuplicateClassMembers
suspicious.description: Disallow duplicate class members.

suspicious.name: noDuplicateCustomProperties
suspicious.description: Disallow duplicate custom properties within declaration blocks.

suspicious.name: noDuplicateElseIf
suspicious.description: Disallow duplicate conditions in if-else-if chains

suspicious.name: noDuplicateFields
suspicious.description: No duplicated fields in GraphQL operations.

suspicious.name: noDuplicateFontNames
suspicious.description: Disallow duplicate names within font families.

suspicious.name: noDuplicateJsxProps
suspicious.description: Prevents JSX properties to be assigned multiple times.

suspicious.name: noDuplicateParameters
suspicious.description: Disallow duplicate function parameter name.

suspicious.name: noDuplicateProperties
suspicious.description: Disallow duplicate properties within declaration blocks.

suspicious.name: noDuplicateSelectorsKeyframeBlock
suspicious.description: Disallow duplicate selectors within keyframe blocks.

suspicious.name: noDuplicateTestHooks
suspicious.description: A describe block should not contain duplicate hooks.

suspicious.name: noEmptyBlockStatements
suspicious.description: Disallow empty block statements and static blocks.

suspicious.name: noEmptyBlock
suspicious.description: Disallow CSS empty blocks.

suspicious.name: noEmptyInterface
suspicious.description: Disallow the declaration of empty interfaces.

suspicious.name: noEmptySource
suspicious.description: Disallow empty sources.

suspicious.name: noEvolvingTypes
suspicious.description: Disallow variables from evolving into any type through reassignments.

suspicious.name: noExplicitAny
suspicious.description: Disallow the any type usage.

suspicious.name: noExportsInTest
suspicious.description: Disallow using export or module.exports in files containing tests

suspicious.name: noExtraNonNullAssertion
suspicious.description: Prevents the wrong usage of the non-null assertion operator (!) in TypeScript files.

suspicious.name: noFallthroughSwitchClause
suspicious.description: Disallow fallthrough of switch clauses.

suspicious.name: noFocusedTests
suspicious.description: Disallow focused tests.

suspicious.name: noFunctionAssign
suspicious.description: Disallow reassigning function declarations.

suspicious.name: noGlobalAssign
suspicious.description: Disallow assignments to native objects and read-only global variables.

suspicious.name: noGlobalIsFinite
suspicious.description: Use Number.isFinite instead of global isFinite.

suspicious.name: noGlobalIsNan
suspicious.description: Use Number.isNaN instead of global isNaN.

suspicious.name: noHeadImportInDocument
suspicious.description: Prevent using the next/head module in pages/_document.js on Next.js projects.

suspicious.name: noImplicitAnyLet
suspicious.description: Disallow use of implicit any type on variable declarations.

suspicious.name: noImportantInKeyframe
suspicious.description: Disallow invalid !important within keyframe declarations

suspicious.name: noIrregularWhitespace
suspicious.description: Disallows the use of irregular whitespace characters.

suspicious.name: noLabelVar
suspicious.description: Disallow labels that share a name with a variable

suspicious.name: noMisleadingCharacterClass
suspicious.description: Disallow characters made with multiple code points in character class syntax.

suspicious.name: noMisleadingInstantiator
suspicious.description: Enforce proper usage of new and constructor.

suspicious.name: noMisplacedAssertion
suspicious.description: Checks that the assertion function, for example expect, is placed inside an it() function call.

suspicious.name: noMisrefactoredShorthandAssign
suspicious.description: Disallow shorthand assign when variable appears on both sides.

suspicious.name: noNonNullAssertedOptionalChain
suspicious.description: Disallow non-null assertions after optional chaining expressions.

suspicious.name: noOctalEscape
suspicious.description: Disallow octal escape sequences in string literals
suspicious.valid:
const foo = "Copyright \u00A9"; // unicode escape
const bar = "Copyright \xA9"; // hexadecimal escape

suspicious.name: noPrototypeBuiltins
suspicious.description: Disallow direct use of Object.prototype builtins.

suspicious.name: noReactForwardRef
suspicious.description: Replaces usages of forwardRef with passing ref as a prop.

suspicious.name: noReactSpecificProps
suspicious.description: Prevents React-specific JSX properties from being used.

suspicious.name: noRedeclare
suspicious.description: Disallow variable, function, class, and type redeclarations in the same scope.

suspicious.name: noShorthandPropertyOverrides
suspicious.description: Disallow shorthand properties that override related longhand properties.

suspicious.name: noSparseArray
suspicious.description: Prevents the use of sparse arrays (arrays with holes).

suspicious.name: noSuspiciousSemicolonInJsx
suspicious.description: It detects possible "wrong" semicolons inside JSX elements.

suspicious.name: noTemplateCurlyInString
suspicious.description: Disallow template literal placeholder syntax in regular strings.

suspicious.name: noThenProperty
suspicious.description: Disallow then property.

suspicious.name: noTsIgnore
suspicious.description: Prevents the use of the TypeScript directive @ts-ignore.

suspicious.name: noUnassignedVariables
suspicious.description: Disallow let or var variables that are read but never assigned.

suspicious.name: noUnknownAtRules
suspicious.description: Disallow unknown at-rules.

suspicious.name: noUnsafeDeclarationMerging
suspicious.description: Disallow unsafe declaration merging between interfaces and classes.
suspicious.valid:
interface Foo {}
class Bar implements Foo {}

suspicious.name: noUnsafeNegation
suspicious.description: Disallow using unsafe negation.

suspicious.name: noUnusedExpressions
suspicious.description: Disallow expression statements that are neither a function call nor an assignment.
suspicious.valid:
{} // In this context, this is a block statement, not an object literal

{ myLabel: foo() } // In this context, this is a block statement with a label and expression, not an object literal

function namedFunctionDeclaration () {}

(function aGenuineIIFE () {}());

f()

a = 0

new C

delete a.b

void a

suspicious.name: noUselessEscapeInString
suspicious.description: Disallow unnecessary escapes in string literals.

suspicious.name: noUselessRegexBackrefs
suspicious.description: Disallow useless backreferences in regular expression literals that always match an empty string.

suspicious.name: noVar
suspicious.description: Disallow the use of var

suspicious.name: useAdjacentOverloadSignatures
suspicious.description: Disallow the use of overload signatures that are not next to each other.

suspicious.name: useAwait
suspicious.description: Ensure async functions utilize await.

suspicious.name: useDefaultSwitchClauseLast
suspicious.description: Enforce default clauses in switch statements to be last

suspicious.name: useDeprecatedDate
suspicious.description: Require the @deprecated directive to specify a deletion date.

suspicious.name: useErrorMessage
suspicious.description: Enforce passing a message value when creating a built-in error.

suspicious.name: useGetterReturn
suspicious.description: Enforce get methods to always return a value.

suspicious.name: useGoogleFontDisplay
suspicious.description: Enforces the use of a recommended display strategy with Google Fonts.

suspicious.name: useGuardForIn
suspicious.description: Require for-in loops to include an if statement.

suspicious.name: useIsArray
suspicious.description: Use Array.isArray() instead of instanceof Array.

suspicious.name: useIterableCallbackReturn
suspicious.description: Enforce consistent return values in iterable callbacks.

suspicious.name: useNamespaceKeyword
suspicious.description: Require using the namespace keyword over the module keyword to declare TypeScript namespaces.

suspicious.name: useNumberToFixedDigitsArgument
suspicious.description: Enforce using the digits argument with Number#toFixed().

suspicious.name: useStaticResponseMethods
suspicious.description: Use static Response methods instead of new Response() constructor when possible.
suspicious.valid:
// JSON.stringify() with a replacer function
new Response(JSON.stringify({ value: 0 }, () => {}))

nursery.name: noAmbiguousAnchorText
nursery.description: Disallow ambiguous anchor descriptions.

nursery.name: noBeforeInteractiveScriptOutsideDocument
nursery.description: Prevent usage of next/script's beforeInteractive strategy outside of pages/_document.js in a Next.js project.
nursery.valid:
// pages/_document.jsx
import { Html, Head, Main, NextScript } from 'next/document'
import Script from 'next/script'

export default function Document() {
    return (
        <Html>
            <Head />
            <body>
                <Main />
                <NextScript />
                <Script
                  src="https://example.com/script.js"
                  strategy="beforeInteractive"
                ></Script>
            </body>
        </Html>
    )
}

nursery.name: noConditionalExpect
nursery.description: Disallow conditional expect() calls inside tests.

nursery.name: noContinue
nursery.description: Disallow continue statements.

nursery.name: noDeprecatedMediaType
nursery.description: Disallow deprecated media types.

nursery.name: noDivRegex
nursery.description: Disallow equal signs explicitly at the beginning of regular expressions.

nursery.name: noDrizzleDeleteWithoutWhere
nursery.description: Require .where() to be called when using .delete() with Drizzle ORM.

nursery.name: noDrizzleUpdateWithoutWhere
nursery.description: Require .where() to be called when using .update() with Drizzle ORM.

nursery.name: noDuplicateArgumentNames
nursery.description: Require all argument names for fields & directives to be unique.

nursery.name: noDuplicateAttributes
nursery.description: Disallow duplication of attributes.

nursery.name: noDuplicateEnumValueNames
nursery.description: Require all enum value names to be unique.

nursery.name: noDuplicateEnumValues
nursery.description: Disallow duplicate enum member values.

nursery.name: noDuplicateFieldDefinitionNames
nursery.description: Require all fields of a type to be unique.

nursery.name: noDuplicateGraphqlOperationName
nursery.description: Enforce unique operation names across a GraphQL document.

nursery.name: noDuplicateInputFieldNames
nursery.description: Require fields within an input object to be unique.

nursery.name: noDuplicateVariableNames
nursery.description: Require all variable definitions to be unique.

nursery.name: noDuplicatedSpreadProps
nursery.description: Disallow JSX prop spreading the same identifier multiple times.

nursery.name: noEqualsToNull
nursery.description: Require the use of === or !== for comparison with null.

nursery.name: noExcessiveClassesPerFile
nursery.description: Enforce a maximum number of classes per file.

nursery.name: noExcessiveLinesPerFile
nursery.description: Restrict the number of lines in a file.

nursery.name: noFloatingClasses
nursery.description: Disallow new operators outside of assignments or comparisons.

nursery.name: noForIn
nursery.description: Disallow iterating using a for-in loop.

nursery.name: noHexColors
nursery.description: Disallow hex colors.

nursery.name: noIncrementDecrement
nursery.description: Disallows the usage of the unary operators ++ and --.

nursery.name: noInlineStyles
nursery.description: Disallow the use of inline styles.

nursery.name: noJsxPropsBind
nursery.description: Disallow .bind(), arrow functions, or function expressions in JSX props

nursery.name: noLeakedRender
nursery.description: Prevent problematic leaked values from being rendered.

nursery.name: noMultiAssign
nursery.description: Disallow use of chained assignment expressions

nursery.name: noMultiStr
nursery.description: Disallow creating multiline strings by escaping newlines.

nursery.name: noNestedPromises
nursery.description: Disallow nested .then() or .catch() promise calls.

nursery.name: noParametersOnlyUsedInRecursion
nursery.description: Disallow function parameters that are only used in recursive calls.

nursery.name: noPlaywrightElementHandle
nursery.description: Disallow usage of element handles (page.$() and page.$$()).

nursery.name: noPlaywrightEval
nursery.description: Disallow usage of page.$eval() and page.$$eval().

nursery.name: noPlaywrightForceOption
nursery.description: Disallow usage of the { force: true } option.

nursery.name: noPlaywrightMissingAwait
nursery.description: Enforce Playwright async APIs to be awaited or returned.

nursery.name: noPlaywrightNetworkidle
nursery.description: Disallow usage of the networkidle option.

nursery.name: noPlaywrightPagePause
nursery.description: Disallow using page.pause().

nursery.name: noPlaywrightUselessAwait
nursery.description: Disallow unnecessary await for Playwright methods that don't return promises.

nursery.name: noPlaywrightWaitForNavigation
nursery.description: Disallow using page.waitForNavigation().

nursery.name: noPlaywrightWaitForSelector
nursery.description: Disallow using page.waitForSelector().

nursery.name: noPlaywrightWaitForTimeout
nursery.description: Disallow using page.waitForTimeout().

nursery.name: noProto
nursery.description: Disallow the use of the deprecated __proto__ object property.

nursery.name: noRedundantDefaultExport
nursery.description: Checks if a default export exports the same symbol as a named export.
nursery.invalid:
export const foo = 42;
export default foo;

nursery.name: noReturnAssign
nursery.description: Disallow assignments in return statements.

nursery.name: noRootType
nursery.description: Disallow the usage of specified root types

nursery.name: noScriptUrl
nursery.description: Disallow javascript: URLs in HTML.
nursery.valid: Click me Click me Click me Not a real href

nursery.name: noShadow
nursery.description: Disallow variable declarations from shadowing variables declared in the outer scope.

nursery.name: noSyncScripts
nursery.description: Prevent the usage of synchronous scripts.
nursery.valid:
<script src="" async></script>
<script src="" defer></script>
<script src="" type="module"></script>

nursery.name: noTernary
nursery.description: Disallow ternary operators.

nursery.name: noUndeclaredEnvVars
nursery.description: Disallow the use of undeclared environment variables.
nursery.valid:
// NODE_ENV is always allowed
const value = process.env.NODE_ENV;

nursery.name: noUnknownAttribute
nursery.description: Disallow unknown DOM properties.

nursery.name: noUnnecessaryConditions
nursery.description: Disallow unnecessary type-based conditions that can be statically determined as redundant.

nursery.name: noUselessReturn
nursery.description: Disallow redundant return statements.

nursery.name: noVueOptionsApi
nursery.description: Disallow the use of Vue Options API.

nursery.name: noVueRefAsOperand
nursery.description: Disallow the use of value wrapped by ref()(Composition API) as operand

nursery.name: useArraySome
nursery.description: Prefer Array.prototype.some() over verbose existence checks.

nursery.name: useBaseline
nursery.description: Disallow CSS properties, values, at-rules, functions, and selectors that are not part of the configured Baseline.

nursery.name: useConsistentEnumValueType
nursery.description: Disallow enums from having both number and string members.

nursery.name: useConsistentGraphqlDescriptions
nursery.description: Require all descriptions to follow the same style (either block or inline) to maintain consistency and improve readability across the schema.

nursery.name: useConsistentMethodSignatures
nursery.description: Enforce consistent use of either method signatures or function properties within interfaces and type aliases.

nursery.name: useDestructuring
nursery.description: Require destructuring from arrays and/or objects

nursery.name: useErrorCause
nursery.description: Enforce that new Error() is thrown with the original error as cause.

nursery.name: useExpect
nursery.description: Ensure that test functions contain at least one expect() or similar assertion.

nursery.name: useExplicitType
nursery.description: Enforce types in functions, methods, variables, and parameters.

nursery.name: useGlobalThis
nursery.description: Enforce the use of globalThis over window, self, and global.

nursery.name: useImportsFirst
nursery.description: Enforce that all imports appear at the top of the module.

nursery.name: useInlineScriptId
nursery.description: Enforce id attribute on next/script components with inline content or dangerouslySetInnerHTML.

nursery.name: useInputName
nursery.description: Require mutation argument to be always called "input"

nursery.name: useLoneAnonymousOperation
nursery.description: Disallow anonymous operations when more than one operation specified in document.

nursery.name: useLoneExecutableDefinition
nursery.description: Require queries, mutations, subscriptions or fragments each to be located in separate files.

nursery.name: useNamedCaptureGroup
nursery.description: Enforce using named capture groups in regular expression.

nursery.name: useNullishCoalescing
nursery.description: Enforce using the nullish coalescing operator (??) instead of logical or (||).
nursery.invalid:
declare const maybeString: string | null;
const value = maybeString || 'default'; // should use ??

nursery.name: usePlaywrightValidDescribeCallback
nursery.description: Enforce valid describe() callback.

nursery.name: useSpread
nursery.description: Enforce the use of the spread operator over .apply().

nursery.name: useUnicodeRegex
nursery.description: Enforce the use of the u or v flag for regular expressions.

nursery.name: useVueMultiWordComponentNames
nursery.description: Enforce multi-word component names in Vue components.

a11y.name: noAriaHiddenOnFocusable
a11y.description: Enforce that aria-hidden="true" is not set on focusable elements.

a11y.name: noAriaUnsupportedElements
a11y.description: Enforce that elements that do not support ARIA roles, states, and properties do not have those attributes.

a11y.name: noAutofocus
a11y.description: Enforce that autoFocus prop is not used on elements.

a11y.name: noDistractingElements
a11y.description: Enforces that no distracting elements are used.

a11y.name: noHeaderScope
a11y.description: The scope prop should be used only on <th> elements.

a11y.name: noInteractiveElementToNoninteractiveRole
a11y.description: Enforce that non-interactive ARIA roles are not assigned to interactive HTML elements.

a11y.name: noLabelWithoutControl
a11y.description: Enforce that a label element or component has a text label and an associated input.

a11y.name: noNoninteractiveElementInteractions
a11y.description: Disallow use event handlers on non-interactive elements.

a11y.name: noNoninteractiveElementToInteractiveRole
a11y.description: Enforce that interactive ARIA roles are not assigned to non-interactive HTML elements.

a11y.name: noNoninteractiveTabindex
a11y.description: Enforce that tabIndex is not assigned to non-interactive HTML elements.

a11y.name: noPositiveTabindex
a11y.description: Prevent the usage of positive integers on tabIndex property

a11y.name: noRedundantAlt
a11y.description: Enforce img alt prop does not contain the word "image", "picture", or "photo".
a11y.valid: <>

a11y.name: noRedundantRoles
a11y.description: Enforce explicit role property is not the same as implicit/default role property on an element.

a11y.name: noStaticElementInteractions
a11y.description: Enforce that static, visible elements (such as <div>) that have click handlers use the valid role attribute.
a11y.valid:
<>
{}}>
{}}> {}}>

a11y.name: noSvgWithoutTitle
a11y.description: Enforces the usage of the title element for the svg element.

a11y.name: useAltText
a11y.description: Enforce that all elements that require alternative text have meaningful information to relay back to the end user.

a11y.name: useAnchorContent
a11y.description: Enforce that anchors have content and that the content is accessible to screen readers.

a11y.name: useAriaActivedescendantWithTabindex
a11y.description: Enforce that tabIndex is assigned to non-interactive HTML elements with aria-activedescendant.

a11y.name: useAriaPropsForRole
a11y.description: Enforce that elements with ARIA roles must have all required ARIA attributes for that role.

a11y.name: useAriaPropsSupportedByRole
a11y.description: Enforce that ARIA properties are valid for the roles that are supported by the element.
a11y.valid: <>

a11y.name: useButtonType
a11y.description: Enforces the usage of the attribute type for the element button

a11y.name: useFocusableInteractive
a11y.description: Elements with an interactive role and interaction handlers must be focusable.

a11y.name: useGenericFontNames
a11y.description: Disallow a missing generic family keyword within font families.

a11y.name: useHeadingContent
a11y.description: Enforce that heading elements (h1, h2, etc.) have content and that the content is accessible to screen readers. Accessible means that it is not hidden using the aria-hidden prop.

a11y.name: useHtmlLang
a11y.description: Enforce that html element has lang attribute.

a11y.name: useIframeTitle
a11y.description: Enforces the usage of the attribute title for the element iframe.
a11y.valid:
<>
  <iframe title="This is a unique title" />
  <iframe title={uniqueTitle} />
  <iframe {...props} />
</>

a11y.name: useKeyWithClickEvents
a11y.description: Enforce onClick is accompanied by at least one of the following: onKeyUp, onKeyDown, onKeyPress.

a11y.name: useKeyWithMouseEvents
a11y.description: Enforce onMouseOver / onMouseOut are accompanied by onFocus / onBlur.
a11y.valid:
<>
  <div onMouseOver={() => {}} onFocus={() => {}} />
  <div onMouseOut={() => {}} onBlur={() => {}} />
  <div onMouseOver={() => {}} {...otherProps} />
  <div onMouseOut={() => {}} {...otherProps} />
  <div onMouseOver={() => {}} onFocus={() => {}} {...otherProps} />
  <div onMouseOut={() => {}} onBlur={() => {}} {...otherProps} />
</>

a11y.name: useMediaCaption
a11y.description: Enforces that audio and video elements must have a track for captions.

a11y.name: useSemanticElements
a11y.description: It detects the use of role attributes in JSX elements and suggests using semantic elements instead.

a11y.name: useValidAnchor
a11y.description: Enforce that all anchors are valid, and they are navigable elements.

a11y.name: useValidAriaRole
a11y.description: Elements with ARIA roles must use a valid, non-abstract ARIA role.

a11y.name: useValidAriaValues
a11y.description: Enforce that ARIA state and property values are valid.
a11y.valid: <> some text some text

a11y.name: useValidAutocomplete
a11y.description: Use valid values for the autocomplete attribute on input elements.

a11y.name: useValidLang
a11y.description: Ensure that the attribute passed to the lang attribute is a correct ISO language and/or country.

security.name: noGlobalEval
security.description: Disallow the use of global eval().

security.name: noSecrets
security.description: Disallow usage of sensitive data such as API keys and tokens.

style.name: noCommonJs
style.description: Disallow use of CommonJs module system in favor of ESM style imports.

style.name: noDefaultExport
style.description: Disallow default exports.

style.name: noDescendingSpecificity
style.description: Disallow a lower specificity selector from coming after a higher specificity selector.
style.invalid:
b a { color: red; }
a { color: red; }
style.valid:
a { color: red; }
b a { color: red; }

style.name: noDoneCallback
style.description: Disallow using a callback in asynchronous tests and hooks.

style.name: noEnum
style.description: Disallow TypeScript enum.

style.name: noExportedImports
style.description: Disallow exporting an imported variable.

style.name: noHeadElement
style.description: Prevent usage of <head> element in a Next.js project.

style.name: noImplicitBoolean
style.description: Disallow implicit true values on JSX boolean attributes

style.name: noInferrableTypes
style.description: Disallow type annotations for variables, parameters, and class properties initialized with a literal expression.

style.name: noJsxLiterals
style.description: Disallow string literals inside JSX elements.

style.name: noMagicNumbers
style.description: Reports usage of "magic numbers" — numbers used directly instead of being assigned to named constants.
style.invalid: let total = price * 1.23; // Magic number for tax rate
style.valid:
const TAX_RATE = 1.23;
let total = price * TAX_RATE;

style.name: noNamespace
style.description: Disallow the use of TypeScript's namespaces.

style.name: noNegationElse
style.description: Disallow negation in the condition of an if statement if it has an else clause.

style.name: noNestedTernary
style.description: Disallow nested ternary expressions.
style.invalid: const thing = foo ? bar : baz === qux ? quxx : foobar;

style.name: noNonNullAssertion
style.description: Disallow non-null assertions using the ! postfix operator.

style.name: noParameterAssign
style.description: Disallow reassigning function parameters.

style.name: noParameterProperties
style.description: Disallow the use of parameter properties in class constructors.

style.name: noProcessEnv
style.description: Disallow the use of process.env.

style.name: noRestrictedGlobals
style.description: This rule allows you to specify global variable names that you don’t want to use in your application.

style.name: noRestrictedImports
style.description: Disallow specified modules when loaded by import or require.

style.name: noShoutyConstants
style.description: Disallow the use of constants which its value is the upper-case version of its name.

style.name: noSubstr
style.description: Enforce the use of String.slice() over String.substr() and String.substring().

style.name: noUnusedTemplateLiteral
style.description: Disallow template literals if interpolation and special-character handling are not needed

style.name: noUselessElse
style.description: Disallow else block when the if block breaks early.

style.name: noYodaExpression
style.description: Disallow the use of yoda expressions.

style.name: useArrayLiterals
style.description: Disallow Array constructors.

style.name: useAsConstAssertion
style.description: Enforce the use of as const over literal type and type annotation.

style.name: useAtIndex
style.description: Use at() instead of integer index access.

style.name: useCollapsedElseIf
style.description: Enforce using else if instead of nested if in else clauses.

style.name: useCollapsedIf
style.description: Enforce using single if instead of nested if clauses.

style.name: useComponentExportOnlyModules
style.description: Enforce declaring components only within modules that export React Components exclusively.
style.invalid:
export const foo = () => {};
export const Bar = () => <></>;

style.name: useConsistentArrayType
style.description: Require consistently using either T[] or Array<T>

style.name: useConsistentArrowReturn
style.description: Enforce consistent arrow function bodies.

style.name: useConsistentBuiltinInstantiation
style.description: Enforce the use of new for all builtins, except String, Number and Boolean.

style.name: useConsistentCurlyBraces
style.description: This rule enforces consistent use of curly braces inside JSX attributes and JSX children.

style.name: useConsistentMemberAccessibility
style.description: Require consistent accessibility modifiers on class properties and methods.

style.name: useConsistentObjectDefinitions
style.description: Require the consistent declaration of object literals. Defaults to explicit definitions.

style.name: useConsistentTypeDefinitions
style.description: Enforce type definitions to consistently use either interface or type.
style.invalid: type Point = { x: number; y: number; };

style.name: useConst
style.description: Require const declarations for variables that are only assigned once.

style.name: useDefaultParameterLast
style.description: Enforce default function parameters and optional function parameters to be last.

style.name: useDefaultSwitchClause
style.description: Require the default clause in switch statements.

style.name: useDeprecatedReason
style.description: Require specifying the reason argument when using @deprecated directive

style.name: useEnumInitializers
style.description: Require that each enum member value be explicitly initialized.

style.name: useExplicitLengthCheck
style.description: Enforce explicitly comparing the length, size, byteLength or byteOffset property of a value.

style.name: useExponentiationOperator
style.description: Disallow the use of Math.pow in favor of the ** operator.

style.name: useExportType
style.description: Promotes the use of export type for types.

style.name: useExportsLast
style.description: Require that all exports are declared after all non-export statements.

style.name: useForOf
style.description: Prefer using for...of loops over standard for loops where possible.

style.name: useGraphqlNamingConvention
style.description: Validates that all enum values are capitalized.

style.name: useGroupedAccessorPairs
style.description: Enforce that getters and setters for the same property are adjacent in class and object definitions.

style.name: useImportType
style.description: Promotes the use of import type for types.
style.valid:
import type { A } from "./mod.js";
let a: A;

style.name: useLiteralEnumMembers
style.description: Require all enum members to be literal values.

style.name: useNodeAssertStrict
style.description: Promotes the usage of node:assert/strict over node:assert.

style.name: useNodejsImportProtocol
style.description: Enforces using the node: protocol for Node.js builtin modules.

style.name: useNumberNamespace
style.description: Use the Number properties instead of global ones.

style.name: useNumericSeparators
style.description: Enforce the use of numeric separators in numeric literals.

style.name: useObjectSpread
style.description: Prefer object spread over Object.assign() when constructing new objects.

style.name: useReactFunctionComponents
style.description: Enforce that components are defined as functions and never as classes.

style.name: useReadonlyClassProperties
style.description: Enforce marking members as readonly if they are never modified outside the constructor.

style.name: useSelfClosingElements
style.description: Prevent extra closing tags for components without children.

style.name: useShorthandAssign
style.description: Require assignment operator shorthand where possible.

style.name: useShorthandFunctionType
style.description: Enforce using function types instead of object type with call signatures.

style.name: useSingleVarDeclarator
style.description: Disallow multiple variable declarations in the same variable statement

style.name: useSymbolDescription
style.description: Require a description parameter for the Symbol().

style.name: useTemplate
style.description: Prefer template literals over string concatenation.

style.name: useThrowNewError
style.description: Require new when throwing an error.

style.name: useThrowOnlyError
style.description: Disallow throwing non-Error values.

style.name: useTrimStartEnd
style.description: Enforce the use of String.trimStart() and String.trimEnd() over String.trimLeft() and String.trimRight().

style.name: useUnifiedTypeSignatures
style.description: Disallow overload signatures that can be unified into a single signature.
style.invalid:
function f(a: number): void;
function f(a: string): void;

correctness.name: noConstAssign
correctness.description: Prevents from having const variables being re-assigned.

correctness.name: noConstantCondition
correctness.description: Disallow constant expressions in conditions

correctness.name: noConstantMathMinMaxClamp
correctness.description: Disallow the use of Math.min and Math.max to clamp a value where the result itself is constant.

correctness.name: noConstructorReturn
correctness.description: Disallow returning a value from a constructor.

correctness.name: noEmptyCharacterClassInRegex
correctness.description: Disallow empty character classes in regular expression literals.

correctness.name: noEmptyPattern
correctness.description: Disallows empty destructuring patterns.

correctness.name: noGlobalDirnameFilename
correctness.description: Disallow the use of __dirname and __filename in the global scope.

correctness.name: noGlobalObjectCalls
correctness.description: Disallow calling global object properties as functions

correctness.name: noInnerDeclarations
correctness.description: Disallow function and var declarations that are accessible outside their block.

correctness.name: noInvalidBuiltinInstantiation
correctness.description: Ensure that builtins are correctly instantiated.

correctness.name: noInvalidConstructorSuper
correctness.description: Prevents the incorrect use of super() inside classes. It also checks whether a call super() is missing from classes that extends other constructors.

correctness.name: noInvalidDirectionInLinearGradient
correctness.description: Disallow non-standard direction values for linear gradient functions.

correctness.name: noInvalidGridAreas
correctness.description: Disallows invalid named grid areas in CSS Grid Layouts.
correctness.valid:
a { grid-template-areas: "a a a"
                         "b b b"; }

correctness.name: noInvalidPositionAtImportRule
correctness.description: Disallow the use of @import at-rules in invalid positions.

correctness.name: noInvalidUseBeforeDeclaration
correctness.description: Disallow the use of variables, function parameters, classes, and enums before their declaration

correctness.name: noMissingVarFunction
correctness.description: Disallow missing var function for css variables.

correctness.name: noNestedComponentDefinitions
correctness.description: Disallows defining React components inside other components.

correctness.name: noNextAsyncClientComponent
correctness.description: Prevent client components from being async functions.

correctness.name: noNodejsModules
correctness.description: Forbid the use of Node.js builtin modules.

correctness.name: noNonoctalDecimalEscape
correctness.description: Disallow \8 and \9 escape sequences in string literals.

correctness.name: noPrecisionLoss
correctness.description: Disallow literal numbers that lose precision

correctness.name: noProcessGlobal
correctness.description: Disallow the use of process global.
correctness.valid:
import process from "node:process";

const foo = process.env.FOO;

correctness.name: noQwikUseVisibleTask
correctness.description: Disallow useVisibleTask$() functions in Qwik components.

correctness.name: noReactPropAssignments
correctness.description: Disallow assigning to React component props.

correctness.name: noRenderReturnValue
correctness.description: Prevent the usage of the return value of React.render.

correctness.name: noRestrictedElements
correctness.description: Disallow the use of configured elements.

correctness.name: noSelfAssign
correctness.description: Disallow assignments where both sides are exactly the same.

correctness.name: noSetterReturn
correctness.description: Disallow returning a value from a setter

correctness.name: noSolidDestructuredProps
correctness.description: Disallow destructuring props inside JSX components in Solid projects.

correctness.name: noStringCaseMismatch
correctness.description: Disallow comparison of expressions modifying the string case with non-compliant value.

correctness.name: noSwitchDeclarations
correctness.description: Disallow lexical declarations in switch clauses.

correctness.name: noUndeclaredVariables
correctness.description: Prevents the usage of variables that haven't been declared inside the document.

correctness.name: noUnknownFunction
correctness.description: Disallow unknown CSS value functions.

correctness.name: noUnknownMediaFeatureName
correctness.description: Disallow unknown media feature names.

correctness.name: noUnknownProperty
correctness.description: Disallow unknown properties.

correctness.name: noUnknownPseudoClass
correctness.description: Disallow unknown pseudo-class selectors.

correctness.name: noUnknownPseudoElement
correctness.description: Disallow unknown pseudo-element selectors.

correctness.name: noUnknownTypeSelector
correctness.description: Disallow unknown type selectors.

correctness.name: noUnknownUnit
correctness.description: Disallow unknown CSS units.

correctness.name: noUnmatchableAnbSelector
correctness.description: Disallow unmatchable An+B selectors.

correctness.name: noUnreachableSuper
correctness.description: Ensures the super() constructor is called exactly once on every code path in a class constructor before this is accessed if the class has a superclass

correctness.name: noUnsafeFinally
correctness.description: Disallow control flow statements in finally blocks.

correctness.name: noUnsafeOptionalChaining
correctness.description: Disallow the use of optional chaining in contexts where the undefined value is not allowed.

correctness.name: noUnusedFunctionParameters
correctness.description: Disallow unused function parameters.

correctness.name: noUnusedImports
correctness.description: Disallow unused imports.

correctness.name: noUnusedLabels
correctness.description: Disallow unused labels.

correctness.name: noUnusedPrivateClassMembers
correctness.description: Disallow unused private class members

correctness.name: noUnusedVariables
correctness.description: Disallow unused variables.

correctness.name: noVoidTypeReturn
correctness.description: Disallow returning a value from a function with the return type 'void'

correctness.name: noVueDataObjectDeclaration
correctness.description: Enforce that Vue component data options are declared as functions.

correctness.name: noVueReservedProps
correctness.description: Disallow reserved names to be used as props.

correctness.name: noVueSetupPropsReactivityLoss
correctness.description: Disallow destructuring of props passed to setup in Vue projects.

correctness.name: useExhaustiveDependencies
correctness.description: Enforce correct dependency usage within React hooks.

correctness.name: useGraphqlNamedOperations
correctness.description: Enforce specifying the name of GraphQL operations.

correctness.name: useHookAtTopLevel
correctness.description: Enforce that all React hooks are being called from the Top Level component functions.

correctness.name: useImageSize
correctness.description: Enforces that elements have both width and height attributes.

correctness.name: useImportExtensions
correctness.description: Enforce file extensions for relative imports.

correctness.name: useIsNan
correctness.description: Require calls to isNaN() when checking for NaN.

correctness.name: useJsonImportAttributes
correctness.description: Enforces the use of with { type: "json" } for JSON module imports.

correctness.name: useJsxKeyInIterable
correctness.description: Disallow missing key props in iterators/collection literals.

correctness.name: useParseIntRadix
correctness.description: Enforce the consistent use of the radix argument when using parseInt().

correctness.name: useQwikClasslist
correctness.description: Prefer using the class prop as a classlist over the classnames helper.

correctness.name: useQwikMethodUsage
correctness.description: Disallow use* hooks outside of component$ or other use* hooks in Qwik applications.

correctness.name: useQwikValidLexicalScope
correctness.description: Disallow unserializable expressions in Qwik dollar ($) scopes.

correctness.name: useSingleJsDocAsterisk
correctness.description: Enforce JSDoc comment lines to start with a single asterisk, except for the first one.

correctness.name: useUniqueElementIds
correctness.description: Prevent the usage of static string literal id attribute on elements.

correctness.name: useValidForDirection
correctness.description: Enforce "for" loop update clause moving the counter in the right direction.

correctness.name: useValidTypeof
correctness.description: This rule checks that the result of a typeof expression is compared to a valid value.

correctness.name: useYield
correctness.description: Require generator functions to contain yield.
